macro: Risk-off composite at -49.59 keeps the tape narrow with only 6/15 names above the 20-day and just three above the 50-day; Hormuz energy risk keeps crude above $101 so leadership is limited to the defense / autonomy pocket.
policy: The Fed is effectively on hold while Hormuz oil disruption keeps the 10-year in the mid-4s, so semis / AI remain trapped until oil and yields both normalize.
delta: IEA now estimates ~8 mb/d of Hormuz-linked supply offline, so crude premium plus this macro stress are the only fresh inputs keeping the tape defensive even after today’s midday refresh.
